problem id: 493b0817
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(4) XOR NOT SHL(1)) OR SHR(6)

examples:
  11111000 -> 10000011
  00111001 -> 00011110
  01011011 -> 11111101
  00001100 -> 00100111
  10100011 -> 10000011
  01101101 -> 11110011
  00000001 -> 11101101

query: 10000101
predicted answer: 10101111
